conservative.name: Velvet Parlance
conservative.requirements: Add L to your dice pool if you are engaged with an enemy

success.description: Place a number of on this card equal to the net successes from the check. These dice are added to your Cunning budget and should be spent first. This card doesn't recharge until there are no dice left on this card

boon.description: Any dice on this card can be used for either Cunning or Aggression

bane.description: For every die you place on this card suffer 1 fatigue or stress (your choice)
